description.en_us: A handler which allows BDS(bedrock dedicated server) to use MCDR
description.zh_cn: 一个让基岩版也能使用MCDR的处理器

introduction.en_us:
**English** | [中文](https://github.com/Elec-Glacier/liteloader_handler/blob/main/README_cn.md)

# Bedrock Liteloader Handler
A handler which allows BDS(bedrock dedicated server) with liteloader modded to use MCDR and its massive plugins.

## Usage
1. Download the latest version from [releases](https://github.com/Elec-Glacier/liteloader_handler/releases)
2. Place this plugin in your MCDR "plugins" directory
3. Start MCDR

## Attentions
Due to a [BDS bug](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/BDS-3791), you might need to use some server modified plugins to let MCDR work correctly, such as [UnicodeFixer](https://www.minebbs.com/resources/unicodefixer.6991/).

## TODOs

introduction.zh_cn:
[English](https://github.com/Elec-Glacier/liteloader_handler/blob/main/README.md) | **中文**

# Bedrock Liteloader Handler
一个让基岩版也能使用MCDR及其插件的服务端处理器

## 使用说明
1. 从仓库[releases](https://github.com/Elec-Glacier/liteloader_handler/releases)中现在最新版本
2. 将下载的文件放入到MCDR的"plugins"文件夹里
3. 启动MCDR

## 注意事项
由于[BDS-3791](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/BDS-3791)，你可能需要插件修改服务端进行修复，如[UnicodeFixer](https://www.minebbs.com/resources/unicodefixer.6991/)

## 代办
适配Script API或者是Levilamina
